items.title: Chelsea reach FA Cup final, Serie A facing another ref scandal, Arsenal win ugly, more
items.dek: Chelsea advanced to the FA Cup final days after changing managers (again), but it's hardly proof of the club's "project" working. Plus: Is Serie A heading for a
items.body: Chelsea advanced to the FA Cup final days after changing managers (again), but it's hardly proof of the club's "project" working. Plus: Is Serie A heading for another referee scandal, and can Arsenal hang on in the English title race?
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Sources: NCAA eyes star QB Sorsby for gambling
items.dek: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby is checking into a residential treatment program for a gambling addiction, sources told ESPN.
items.body: Texas Tech QB Brendan Sorsby is checking into a residential treatment program for a gambling addiction, sources told ESPN.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Riley not retiring, sticking with 'win big' approach
items.dek: Pat Riley made it clear he is not retiring or changing his approach to running the Heat after Miami missed the playoffs for the first time since 2018-19.
items.body: Pat Riley made it clear he is not retiring or changing his approach to running the Heat after Miami missed the playoffs for the first time since 2018-19.
items.author: IriLine Desk
